What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Severity
- [ ] Critical - Blocks release/demo
- [ ] High - Major functionality broken
- [ ] Medium - Feature partially broken
- [ ] Low - Minor issue or cosmetic

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]

- Version/Commit: [e.g., main@abc123]
